name: bg-drill-blob-2
prompt: a soft warm app background illustration, flat vector, gentle and non-distracting, low-contrast, soft gradients and faint paper texture, warm palette (soft cream #FFF6EC base, amber #FFB23E and orange #FF8A3D, teal #2DD4BF accents), playful and friendly, NO text, NO words, NO guitar fretboard lines. Keep the CENTER calm and mostly empty for app content. Wide landscape composition. The design language: large soft rounded translucent organic blob shapes. the translucent blobs in teal, coral and amber form gentle soft bands along the top edge and the bottom edge, with a calm cream center band between them
